title: AgentHandoff
description: A single typed message exchanged between two agents through the transport layer (LocalTransport or BandTransport). Every handoff is validated against this schema before being sent and after being received.

type.description: Semantic type of this handoff — determines which contract the payload holds

payload.description: The contract object for this handoff type. Validated by the receiving agent against the appropriate schema before processing.

metadata.description: Transport-level metadata (Band message ID, sequence number, etc.) — populated by BandTransport, empty for LocalTransport

received_at.description: Stamped by the receiving agent on arrival
